input.command:
# Try data-safety counts via the production API using anon key (public)
SUPABASE_URL="https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co"
ANON_KEY=$(printenv EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY 2>/dev/null || echo "")
echo "Anon key available: $([ -n "$ANON_KEY" ] && echo YES || echo NO)"

# Try counting via REST API with anon key and Prefer: count=exact header
for table in members investors buyers deals project_videos jv_deals; do
  COUNT=$(curl -s -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANON_KEY" \
    -H "Prefer: count=exact" \
    -H "Range: 0-0" \
    "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?select=id" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  # Extract count from content-range header
  HEADERS=$(curl -sI -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANON_KEY" \
    -H "Prefer: count=exact" \
    -H "Range: 0-0" \
    "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?select=id" 2>/dev/null)
  RANGE=$(echo "$HEADERS" | grep -i content-range | tr -d '\r')
  echo "  $table: $RANGE"
done

output.stdout:
Anon key available: NO
  members: 
  investors: 
  buyers: 
  deals: 
  project_videos: 
  jv_deals:

# Check production health for current SHA
curl -s "https://api.ivxholding.com/health" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f'Commit: {data.get(\"commit\",\"?\")[:12]}')
print(f'Status: {data.get(\"status\",\"?\")}')
print(f'AI ok: {data.get(\"aiStartupValidation\",{}).get(\"ok\",\"?\")}')
print(f'SR enabled: {data.get(\"seniorDeveloperRuntime\",{}).get(\"enabled\",\"?\")}')
print(f'SR vars: {data.get(\"seniorDeveloperRuntime\",{}).get(\"variablesValidated\",\"?\")}')
print(f'SR blockers: {data.get(\"seniorDeveloperRuntime\",{}).get(\"blockers\",[])}')
print(f'Boot: {data.get(\"bootTime\",\"?\")}')
# Check for ivxSeniorDeveloperFinalVerification
fv = data.get('ivxSeniorDeveloperFinalVerification')
if fv:
    print(f'FinalVerification: {json.dumps(fv, indent=2)}')
else:
    print('FinalVerification: NOT PRESENT (old deploy still live)')
" 2>&1

echo "---"
# Try reading from the expo env
cat expo/.env.example 2>/dev/null | grep SUPABASE | head -5
echo "---"
# Check if we can get the anon key from the rendered env vars on Render
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs" \
  -H "Accept: application/json" \
  "https://api.render.com/v1/services/srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0/env-vars" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
for v in data:
    ev = v.get('envVar', {})
    key = ev.get('key', '')
    # Only show key names, NOT values, for security
    if 'SUPABASE' in key or 'ANON' in key:
        print(f'  {key}: present (value redacted)')
" 2>&1
